description: ICICI Lombard is an Indian general insurance company offering personal, business, and corporate insurance products and related digital services. Its website includes a corporate insurance portal that mentions API-based digital solutions for clients and partners.
summary: ICICI Lombard publicly advertises a partner-facing HTTP API surface under its Corporate Insurance Digital Solutions offering, but the machine-readable spec, base URL, and exact auth mechanics are not public; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found on icicilombard.com.
